title: Add rate_limits field to Inner and rate_limit_per_min config
description: Why: rate limiter state must live in AppState. What: (1) add 'rate_limits: DashMap<String, (u32, Instant)>' to Inner struct in relay/src/state.rs (import std::time::Instant); (2) add 'rate_limit_per_min: u32' to Inner (default 120); (3) update AppState::new signature to accept rate_limit_per_min: u32; (4) initialize DashMap::new() and store rate_limit_per_min; (5) update all AppState::new call sites (relay/src/main.rs and any test files). Use dashmap::DashMap which is already a dependency.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build --workspace clean; AppState::new takes new param everywhere
close_reason: rate_limits and rate_limit_per_min added to Inner; AppState::new updated
